description: Get the inbound External Data Shares bypass policy for a workspace (Preview API). Response merges the ETag response header into an `etag` field so it can round-trip through `set-inbound-external-data-shares-policy --if-match`.
notes: Unlike the other workspace networking policy endpoints (network-policy, firewall-rules, git-outbound-policy, etc.), this endpoint returns an ETag for optimistic concurrency. `defaultAction` is either 'Allow' (External Data Shares traffic may bypass inbound restrictions) or 'Deny'. GET requires viewer+ role. The corresponding PUT (set-inbound-external-data-shares-policy) requires admin role and is a Preview API. Round-trip the `etag` value via `--if-match` on set-inbound-external-data-shares-policy to avoid overwriting concurrent changes.

query_examples.description: Extract just the current bypass setting
Extract the ETag to pass to --if-match on the next set call
